scripts.start: sbt 'Compile / fastOptJS / webpack' && cp src/main/resources/index.html src/main/resources/style.css target/scala-2.13/scalajs-bundler/main/ && cp -r src/main/resources/logos target/scala-2.13/scalajs-bundler/main/ && echo '\n✅ Build complete — serving on http://localhost:8080\n' && cd target/scala-2.13/scalajs-bundler/main && python3 -m http.server 8080
